title: Commitments
noCommitments: You don't have any commitments yet

wizard.verificationHelper: Choose who can vote to mark your commitment as failed
wizard.endDateError: End date must be after start date
wizard.supportersHelper: Invite people to hold you accountable (optional)
wizard.supportersInfo: Supporters can verify your check-ins and vote on your commitment outcome. You can always add more supporters later.
wizard.createError: Failed to create commitment. Please try again.
wizard.paymentErrorMessage: Your commitment was created, but we couldn't process the payment. Don't worry - you can complete the payment later.
wizard.paymentErrorRetry: Go to your commitments list to retry the payment when you're ready.
wizard.stakeLockInfo: Your stake will be locked once this commitment is created. If you fail, the stake will be distributed to charity and supporters based on your settings.

frequency.title: How often will you check in?
frequency.subtitle: Choose your check-in frequency. You can make up missed days within each period.
frequency.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one day
frequency.lockedWarning: Frequency cannot be changed after activation

times_per_week.title: Times per Week
times_per_week.description: Check in multiple times each week

times_per_month.title: Times per Month
times_per_month.description: Check in multiple times each month

makeUpInfo.title: Make-up Check-ins
makeUpInfo.description: You can check in on any day to make up for missed days within the same period.

schedule.title: Set Your Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Configure reminders to help you stay on track
schedule.setPreferredTimeDesc: Get reminded at your chosen time
schedule.reminderBeforeDesc: Get a heads up before your check-in time
schedule.reminderAtTimeDesc: Get notified right when it's time
schedule.noReminders: No time preference set. You can check in anytime.

softEnforcement.title: Soft Reminders
softEnforcement.description: Reminders are optional and won't affect your commitment. You can check in at any time.

motivation.title: Why does this matter to you?
motivation.subtitle: Write a personal note to remind yourself why you're making this commitment (optional)
motivation.placeholder: This commitment matters to me because...

benefits.title: Why This Helps
benefits.description: Having a personal reason written down increases your chances of success. It reminds you of your motivation when things get tough.

motivation.privacyNote: Your motivation is private and only visible to you

future.getReady: Get ready! Your commitment begins soon.

assignCustodian.title: This commitment needs a money-holder
assignCustodian.body: Assign a trusted person to hold your stake, or share an invite link so they can join and create their account.

cancelDraft.explainer: This commitment wasn't completed and can't be activated.
cancelDraft.confirmMessage: This will permanently remove this incomplete commitment. This can't be undone.
cancelDraft.errorMessage: Something went wrong removing this commitment. Please try again.

restart.title: Restart Commitment
restart.fullResetDesc: Start completely fresh with new dates and stake
restart.sameRulesDesc: Keep the same stake and rules, just new dates
restart.adjustedDesc: Modify frequency or stake for this attempt
restart.error: Failed to restart commitment. Please try again.
restart.frequencyRecommendationDesc: Your previous attempt was {{previous}}. We recommend trying {{recommended}} this time.

payment.pixInstructions: Scan the QR code or copy the code to pay in your bank app

reportFailure.title: Report Failure
reportFailure.message: Are you sure you want to report that you failed this commitment? This action cannot be undone and your stake will be forfeited.

verification.infoText: You can always report your own failure. This setting controls whether your supporters can also vote to mark your commitment as failed.

self_only.title: Self Report Only
self_only.description: Only you can report if you failed. Supporters can encourage but cannot vote.

single_supporter.title: Any Supporter
single_supporter.description: Any single supporter can vote to mark your commitment as failed.

majority.title: Majority Vote
majority.description: More than half of your supporters must vote to mark it as failed.

unanimous.title: Unanimous Vote
unanimous.description: All supporters must agree to mark your commitment as failed.

invite.title: Invite people
invite.subtitle: Share a link so others can support this commitment. They'll see what it's about and what's at stake, then create an account to join.

roleDescriptions.verifier: Can confirm or dispute your check-ins.
roleDescriptions.encourager: Can cheer you on and react to your check-ins.

invite.noLinks: No active links yet. Generate one to start inviting.

custodian.title: Set up a money-holder
custodian.subtitle: Assign a trusted person to hold your stake. They confirm your deposit and, if the commitment breaks, send the payout. You can enter their email directly, or share an invite link so they create an account and join.
custodian.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
custodian.assignError: Couldn't assign the money-holder. Please try again.
custodian.linkExplainer: Whoever opens this link is asked to become the money-holder for this commitment.
